title: People Involved in Architecture and Construction

sense.definition: a skilled tradesperson who specializes in the construction, installation, repair, and maintenance of roofs on buildings

examples.x: The roofer arrived early in the morning to begin the repairs on the damaged roof.
A skilled roofer can complete the job quickly and efficiently, ensuring the roof is secure.
After the storm, the roofer was called in to fix the leaks caused by strong winds.
The roofer wore safety gear while working on the steep roof to prevent accidents.
A reliable roofer can help extend the life of a roof with regular maintenance and inspections.

sense.definition: someone who deals with electrical equipment, such as repairing or installing them

examples.x: The electrician fixed the faulty wiring that caused the power outage.
She called an electrician to install new light fixtures in the kitchen.
The electrician tested the electrical system to ensure it met safety standards.
He hired an electrician to upgrade the circuit breaker to handle more appliances.
They consulted an electrician to troubleshoot the issue with the flickering lights.

sense.definition: a skilled individual who specializes in repairing and fixing mechanical, electrical, or structural issues in various systems, equipment, or appliances to restore them to proper working condition

examples.x: The repairman arrived quickly to fix the broken washing machine.
We called a repairman to fix the leak in the kitchen sink.
I had to wait a few days before the repairman could come and fix my car.
The repairman was able to fix the heating system just in time for the cold weather.
When the television stopped working, we contacted a repairman to get it fixed.

sense.definition: a person whose job or hobby involves making and repairing locks

examples.x: The locksmith offered to make spare keys for my new home.
A locksmith is needed to install a new security system in the office building.
After the break-in, we hired a locksmith to rekey all the locks.
She was able to call a locksmith when her front door wouldn't open.
The locksmith worked quickly to fix the broken lock on the garage door.

sense.definition: someone who works with wooden objects as a job

examples.x: He worked with the carpenter to design and install new kitchen cabinets.
The carpenter crafted a beautiful wooden cabinet for the living room.
They needed a carpenter to restore the old wooden doors in the historic house.
The carpenter measured and cut the wood to build custom shelves.
She hired a carpenter to fix the damaged wooden deck in her backyard.

sense.definition: a person whose profession is to kill certain types of animals or insects that are not wanted in a place

examples.x: The exterminator came to the house to remove the rats that had gotten into the attic.
After seeing a few ants in the kitchen, she called an exterminator to take care of the problem.
The exterminator used special chemicals to eliminate the termites that were damaging the wooden beams.
The building hired an exterminator to deal with a recent bedbug infestation.
We had to schedule an appointment with an exterminator after finding a nest of wasps near the garage.

sense.definition: a skilled laborer who performs various tasks in the construction industry, including but not limited to building, renovating, and repairing structures

examples.x: The construction worker spent the day laying bricks for the new house.
After training for months, he became a skilled construction worker specializing in roofing.
The construction worker wore a hard hat to stay safe while working on the building site.
Many construction workers were needed to complete the highway project on time.
A construction worker climbed the scaffolding to install windows on the upper floors.

sense.definition: a person whose job is designing buildings and typically supervising their construction

examples.x: The architect designed a stunning modern home that incorporates sustainable building practices and energy-efficient features.
After years of studying, she finally graduated as an architect and landed a job at a prestigious firm.
The architect presented the blueprints for the new community center to the city council for approval.
Many famous architects, such as Frank Lloyd Wright and Zaha Hadid, have left a lasting impact on the field with their innovative designs.
As an architect, he enjoys transforming his clients' visions into functional and aesthetically pleasing spaces.

sense.definition: a professional who plans, designs, and builds buildings, bridges, roads, and other structures

examples.x: After years of study, he became a licensed civil engineer and began working on large-scale projects.
She works as a civil engineer, specializing in the construction of highways and road systems.
The civil engineer suggested improvements to the drainage system to prevent flooding in the area.
As a civil engineer, she managed the construction of several high-rise buildings in the city.
The civil engineer inspected the construction site to ensure the foundation was strong enough.

sense.definition: a professional who oversees and coordinates the planning, execution, and completion of construction projects

examples.x: The construction manager was in charge of ensuring the project stayed on schedule and within budget.
She hired a construction manager to supervise the building of her new home.
A skilled construction manager can make all the difference in the smooth operation of a project.
The construction manager worked closely with architects to make sure the design plans were followed.

sense.definition: a professional who specializes in the design, analysis, and assessment of structures, such as buildings, bridges, and other infrastructure, to ensure their stability, strength, and safety

examples.x: The structural engineer designed the building's foundation to withstand heavy loads and high winds.
Before construction began, the structural engineer analyzed the site's soil conditions to ensure the stability of the structure.
The structural engineer worked with the architect to make sure the design was both aesthetically pleasing and safe.
After the earthquake, the structural engineer assessed the damage to ensure the building was still safe for occupancy.
During the renovation, the structural engineer recommended strengthening the walls to prevent collapse.

sense.definition: a skilled professional who transforms interior spaces through the thoughtful selection and arrangement of furniture, accessories, colors, and materials to create functional and visually appealing environments

examples.x: She works as an interior designer, creating stylish and functional spaces for her clients.
The interior designer helped us choose the perfect colors and furniture for our living room.
After hiring an interior designer, the entire house was completely revamped with modern designs.
The interior designer's vision transformed the dull office into a vibrant and inviting space.
As an interior designer, he is skilled at mixing different materials to create unique spaces.

sense.definition: a professional who designs outdoor spaces, such as parks, gardens, residential landscapes, or urban areas, by integrating elements such as plants, landforms, structures, and water features to create functional and aesthetically pleasing environments

examples.x: The landscape architect designed a beautiful garden with pathways, benches, and a small pond.
As a landscape architect, she focuses on creating sustainable outdoor spaces that blend with nature.
After studying the site, the landscape architect proposed a layout that included both green areas and recreational spaces.
The landscape architect used native plants to reduce water usage and maintain the local ecosystem.
The city hired a landscape architect to redesign the public park and add more walking trails.

sense.definition: a professional who develops plans and strategies for the effective use and development of land in urban areas, considering factors such as zoning, transportation, infrastructure, and community needs to create sustainable and livable cities or neighborhoods

examples.x: The city hired an urban planner to help develop a more sustainable approach to urban growth.
As part of the project, the urban planner recommended building more affordable housing near public transit hubs.
After years of study, the urban planner suggested ways to reduce traffic congestion by adding more public transportation options.
The urban planner worked closely with local residents to gather input for the new park design.

sense.definition: a professional who measures and maps land to determine boundaries and features

a professional who calculates and estimates the cost of materials, labor, and other expenses associated with a construction project, providing accurate cost projections to help in budgeting and bidding processes

a professional who designs, develops, and maintains electrical systems, equipment, and components, specializing in areas such as power generation, transmission, distribution, electronics, or telecommunications

examples.x: The company hired an electrical engineer to develop a new electronic device.
A team of electrical engineers is developing safer power grids for rural areas.
The electrical engineer repaired the faulty connections in the machine.
She became an electrical engineer because she loved working with circuits.

sense.definition: a professional who specializes in the design, installation, and maintenance of heating, ventilation, and air conditioning systems for buildings, ensuring optimal comfort and air quality

examples.x: The hotel hired an HVAC engineer to upgrade its outdated air conditioning units.
The HVAC engineer checked the ventilation system to ensure proper airflow throughout the factory.
Before starting construction, the architect consulted an HVAC engineer for a sustainable climate control design.
A skilled HVAC engineer can help reduce energy costs by optimizing your heating system.
When the heating system broke down, the company called an HVAC engineer to diagnose the problem.

sense.definition: a professional who assesses construction projects at various stages to ensure compliance with building codes, regulations, and project specifications, monitoring the quality of workmanship and materials used

examples.x: A construction inspector must verify that all materials used meet safety standards.
Before the building could open, the construction inspector conducted a final review of the structure.
The construction inspector found some issues with the plumbing system and requested immediate corrections.
During the project, the construction inspector noted delays caused by improper material delivery.
The construction inspector carefully examined the electrical wiring to avoid potential hazards.

sense.definition: a site supervisor who manages daily construction activities and coordinates the workforce

examples.x: The construction foreman assigned tasks to the crew at the start of the day.
During the meeting, the construction foreman discussed safety measures with the team.
The construction foreman resolved an issue with the delivery of building materials.
A good construction foreman ensures that every worker knows their responsibilities.

sense.definition: a person who is responsible for overseeing and managing construction activities at a work site, ensuring adherence to safety protocols, coordinating the workforce, and ensuring efficient progress of the project

examples.x: The site supervisor ensured that all materials were delivered on time to avoid delays.
As the site supervisor, he ensured the project was completed on time and within budget.
The site supervisor coordinated with the team to solve any issues that delayed the work.
The site supervisor held daily meetings to update the team on the project's progress.

sense.definition: a professional who supports the work of architects by producing detailed technical drawings, creating 3D models, preparing construction documents, and assisting with project coordination and documentation

examples.x: As an architectural technician, she ensured that the designs followed safety standards and building codes.
The architectural technician helped solve problems during construction by making adjustments to the original plans.
The architectural technician prepared the detailed plans for the new office building.
The architectural technician worked closely with the architect to make sure the plans were practical and feasible.

sense.definition: a professional who uses specialized software to create detailed drawings and plans for buildings, machines, or products

examples.x: A computer-aided design technician plays a crucial role in translating conceptual ideas into precise digital blueprints for manufacturing.
With advancements in technology, the demand for skilled computer-aided design technicians continues to grow across various industries such as automotive, aerospace, and architecture.

sense.definition: an individual or company that is hired to perform specific construction, renovation, or installation work according to a contract
someone who installs and repairs pipes, toilets, etc.

examples.x: The plumber fixed the leaky faucet in the kitchen, stopping the constant drip.
He called a plumber to unclog the drain that was causing water to back up.
The plumber installed new pipes during the renovation of the bathroom.
She scheduled an appointment with the plumber to check the water heater for any issues.
The plumber provided advice on how to prevent future plumbing problems.

sense.definition: a man who is skilled in practical jobs in or outside the house, performing them either as an occupation or hobby

examples.x: The handyman fixed the leaky faucet and repaired the broken fence in the backyard.
She hired a handyman to assemble new furniture and hang shelves in her apartment.
As a retired handyman, he enjoys helping neighbors with small repairs around their homes.
The handyman's expertise extends to plumbing, electrical work, and carpentry.
The homeowner relied on the handyman for regular maintenance tasks and minor renovations.

sense.definition: a skilled craftsman who works with stone, brick, or concrete to build structures such as walls, buildings, etc.
someone whose job is to paint buildings, walls, etc.

examples.x: As a painter, he must have different brushes for different surfaces.
My uncle is a talented painter and decorator.
She hired a painter to brighten up her living room.
The painter carefully covered the furniture before starting his work.
The painter worked efficiently, finishing three rooms in just two days.
